comment: SignedApprovalToken conformance vectors. Accepted vectors must parse, enforce strict known keys at every object boundary, validate WebAuthn assertion byte budgets, and serialize to expected.canonicalSerialization. Rejected vectors must fail with an error that references expectedError.
